_comment: Strata DS — Claude Code UserPromptSubmit hook example.
Place this at .claude/hooks/UserPromptSubmit.json in any project that consumes the DS.
It auto-injects a reminder into the AI's context when the user mentions UI keywords,
guaranteeing plan_ui gets called even when the prompt is implicit ('design a sign-in screen',
'I need a place to show notifications', etc.).
The hook runs BEFORE the AI processes the prompt. The AI sees the injected text
as additional context, not as user input.
- Detects 30+ UI nouns and verbs (build/add/create/make/design + component/layout/navbar/...)
- Injects a one-line reminder telling the AI to call plan_ui first
- Lightweight (just regex matching, no MCP calls)
Keep this file in version control so every contributor and AI session benefits.

matchers.name: Strata DS — auto-remind plan_ui on UI prompts
matchers.inject: 🎨 [Strata DS active] The user mentioned a UI element. Before writing any code, you MUST call `plan_ui` on the strata-ds MCP server with a concrete description. The response gives you the recommended component, required tokens, applicable rules, and anti-patterns to avoid. Skip this and you'll drift from the DS. If unsure how to invoke the MCP, call `get_session_briefing` first.
